ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size (e.g., 36 XS, 38 S) */,
  "garment_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the garment type (e.g., tops, bottoms, dresses) */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand of the garment */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the size is applicable */,
  "is_standard" INTEGER /* Indicates if the size is a standard size */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the size was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the size was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sizes_garment_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("garment_type_id") REFERENCES garment_types ("garment_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "garment_types" (
  "garment_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each garment type */,
  "garment_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the garment type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the garment type */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender (e.g., Men, Women, Unisex) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category (e.g., Casual, Formal, Sport) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the garment type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the garment type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("garment_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement point */,
  "measurement_name" TEXT /* Name of the measurement point (e.g., length, chest, shoulder) */,
  "garment_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the garment type */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., cm, inches) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the measurement point */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the measurement was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the measurement was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_garment_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("garment_type_id") REFERENCES garment_types ("garment_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_measurements" (
  "size_measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement value */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement point */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the measurement point for the size */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the value */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the measurement value was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the measurement value was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_measurements_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_measurements_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fabrics" (
  "fabric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fabric */,
  "fabric_name" TEXT /* Name of the fabric */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the fabric */,
  "material" TEXT /* Primary material of the fabric */,
  "blend" TEXT /* Blend materials (e.g., 60% Cotton, 40% Polyester) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the fabric was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the fabric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fabric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "garment_fabrics" (
  "garment_fabric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each garment-fabric combination */,
  "garment_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the garment type */,
  "fabric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fabric */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the fabric used in the garment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the garment-fabric combination was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the garment-fabric combination was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("garment_fabric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_garment_fabrics_garment_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("garment_type_id") REFERENCES garment_types ("garment_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_garment_fabrics_fabric_id FOREIGN KEY ("fabric_id") REFERENCES fabrics ("fabric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "care_instructions" (
  "care_instruction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each care instruction */,
  "fabric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fabric */,
  "instruction" TEXT /* Care instruction for the fabric */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of care instruction (e.g., Washing, Ironing, Drying) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the care instruction was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the care instruction was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("care_instruction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_care_instructions_fabric_id FOREIGN KEY ("fabric_id") REFERENCES fabrics ("fabric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "garment_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the garment type */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand */,
  "fabric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the primary fabric */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "stock" INTEGER /* Stock quantity */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_garment_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("garment_type_id") REFERENCES garment_types ("garment_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_fabric_id FOREIGN KEY ("fabric_id") REFERENCES fabrics ("fabric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., designer, product manager, customer service) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
